## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does. Link any related issues.

**Fixes #ISSUE** (if applicable)
**Related to #ISSUE** (if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI update (no functional change)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI / config update

## Screenshots / screen recordings

If your change is visual, add before/after screenshots or a screen recording.

### Before

[Drag a screenshot here or remove this section]

### After

[Drag a screenshot here or remove this section]

## How to test

Step-by-step instructions for the reviewer to test this change:

1. Pull this branch
2. Run `npm install` (if you haven't)
3. Run `npm run dev`
4. Go to `http://localhost:3000/...`
5. ...

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where it's not obvious
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested my changes in:
  - [ ] Chrome (desktop)
  - [ ] Safari (desktop)
  - [ ] Firefox (desktop)
  - [ ] iOS Safari
  - [ ] Android Chrome
- [ ] I have tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] I have tested the build (`npm run build`) and verified it works

## Performance impact

Does this change affect bundle size or runtime performance?

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] Slight regression (please explain below)
- [ ] Significant regression (please explain below)

**If regression, please describe:**

## Breaking changes

If this is a breaking change, describe the migration path for existing users.
